title: Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy (SACT) data set - NDRS
status: v4.0 collection commenced 1 April 2026 (3-month rollout period)
note: SACT v4.0: Data collection commenced 1 April 2026. Rollout period April-June 2026 (partial trust submissions). Full conformance expected 1 July 2026. First COMPLETE monthly dataset expected August 2026. Data NOT available to external systems until after rollout (post June 2026). Interactive Shiny dashboard - data downloadable via dashboard UI. Auto-download not supported for Shiny apps.
